title: Clavicular story takes dark turn after overdose as early hospital exit and PR support loss raise serious questions
summary_full: Braden Clavicular scared fans after a livestream overdose on April 14, 2026. He later called the moment “brutal” and admitted using substances to cope. Reports say he left the hospital early against advice. He then attended a club event, while PR agent Mitchell Jackson reportedly stopped working with him until he seeks addiction treatment.
